response: TEXT: THE REQUEST IS TO ASERT WHETHER MOVIE (1) AND MOVIE (2) ARE REFERING TO THE SAME ENTITY OR NOT. THE FIRST TABLE SHOWS MOVIE (1) WITH YEAR 2015, DIRECTOR PETER DELUISE, NAME R.L. STINE'S MONSTERVILLE: THE CABINET OF SOULS, WRITERS DAN ANGEL; BILLY BROWN, AND ACTORS DOVE CAMERON; KATHERINE McNAMARA; RYAN MCGARTHAN. THE SECOND TABLE SHOWS MOVIE (2) WITH YEAR 2014.0, DIRECTOR PETER JACKSON, TITLE THE HOBBIT: THE BATTLE OF THE FIVE ARMIES, WRITERS J.R.R. TOLKIE; PETER JACKSON; PHILIPP A BOYENS; GUILLERMO DEL TORO, AND ACTORS MARTIN FREEMAN; IAN McKELLAN; RICHARD ARMITAGE; KEN STOTT.
